environment_setup.filesystem_state: Node.js environment active. FedEx shipping rate API DNS is failing.

evaluation_loop.condition: Fetch the latest expedited shipping rates for the customer checkout session.

injected_failure_state.observation: FetchError: request to https://api.fedex.com/rate/v1 failed, reason: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND api.fedex.com

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent categorizes the ENOTFOUND DNS error as a network drop and executes the exact same command again.
